evals.prompt: I'm building an order management system in Rust using fmodel-rust. I need a Decider for orders that handles Create, Update, and Cancel commands. The state should track order_id, customer_name, items (Vec<String>), and whether it's cancelled. Make sure Create fails if the order already exists, Cancel fails if already cancelled, and Update fails if cancelled. Include tests using fmodel's test specification DSL.
evals.expected_output: A complete Decider with decide/evolve/initial_state closures, proper error handling, OrderCommand/OrderEvent/OrderState types, and DeciderTestSpecification tests covering happy paths and error cases.

evals.prompt: I have two separate deciders in my Rust project using fmodel-rust: a WalletDecider (commands: CreateWallet, CreditBalance, DebitBalance; events: WalletCreated, BalanceCredited, BalanceDebited) and an EscrowDecider (commands: CreateEscrow, ReleaseEscrow; events: EscrowCreated, EscrowReleased). I need to combine them into a single transactional orchestrating aggregate where releasing an escrow automatically credits the wallet. Show me the full composition: combined decider with Sum types, mapping functions to unified domain enums, the saga for cross-aggregate reactions, and wiring it all into an EventSourcedOrchestratingAggregate.
evals.expected_output: Complete code showing: unified Command/Event enums, bidirectional mapping functions (command_to_sum, sum_to_event, event_to_sum), error unification via map_error, Decider.combine() + map_command + map_event chain, a Saga reacting to EscrowReleased to produce CreditBalance, and EventSourcedOrchestratingAggregate wiring.

evals.prompt: I'm using fmodel-rust and I need to set up read model projections. I have OrderEvent (Created, Updated, Cancelled) and ShipmentEvent (Created, Shipped, Delivered). I want two separate View projections - an OrderViewState and a ShipmentViewState - that both process a unified AppEvent enum. Merge them together and wire with MaterializedView. Also show me how to test the views using ViewTestSpecification.
evals.expected_output: Pure View definitions for both order and shipment with evolve/initial_state, View.merge() to combine them, ViewStateRepository trait implementation sketch, MaterializedView wiring, and ViewTestSpecification tests.
